item.name: AppyWay Fetch a parking quote by id

request.name: AppyWay Fetch a parking quote by id

description.content:
Searches for a parking result with the supplied ID. Result indicates whether parking is allowed at the location.
If parking is allowed for all or part of the requested window,
the result contains a list of quotes containing information such as price, payment methods, maximum stay and no return policy.

item.name: AppyWay Find parking entities by centre and viewport size

request.name: AppyWay Find parking entities by centre and viewport size

description.content:
This query creates a square viewport with the centre at ViewportCentre and side length of ViewportSize.
It then returns a list of all the parking entities within the bounds of that polygon, along with their distance from the DistanceCalculationLocation if supplied,
or the viewport centre if not. Entities are ordered by this distance.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: AppyWay Find parking entities by viewport

request.name: AppyWay Find parking entities by viewport

description.content:
This query creates a custom viewport from the supplied GeoJson polygon.
It then returns a list of all the parking entities within the bounds of that polygon, along with their distance from the DistanceCalculationLocation if supplied,
or the viewport centre if not. Entities are ordered by this distance.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: AppyWay Find parking quotes by centre and viewport size

request.name: AppyWay Find parking quotes by centre and viewport size

description.content:
This query creates a square viewport with the centre at ViewportCentre and side length of ViewportSize.
It then returns a list of search results for all parking entities within the bounds of that polygon.
Results are ordered by proximity to the DistanceCalculationLocation if supplied, or the viewport centre if not.
            
Each result indicates whether parking is allowed at that location. If parking is allowed for all or part of the requested window,
the result contains a list of quotes containing information such as price, payment methods, maximum stay and no return policy.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.name: AppyWay Find parking quotes by viewport

description.content:
This query creates a custom viewport from the supplied GeoJson polygon.
It then returns a list of search results for all parking entities within the bounds of that polygon.
Results are ordered by proximity to the DistanceCalculationLocation if supplied, or the viewport centre if not.
            
Each result indicates whether parking is allowed at that location. If parking is allowed for all or part of the requested window,
the result contains a list of quotes containing information such as price, payment methods, maximum stay and no return policy.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

The AppyWay Explorer API allows developers to access a wealth of data related to parking and electric vehicle charging infrastructure. With this API, developers can seamlessly integrate real-time information such as parking availability, pricing, and location details into their own applications. This allows for improved user experience and convenience for drivers seeking parking spaces or charging stations. Additionally, the API offers insights into traffic conditions and traffic flow, providing valuable information for urban planning and transportation management. Overall, the AppyWay Explorer API streamlines the process of accessing and utilizing parking and charging infrastructure data, ultimately improving efficiency and accessibility in urban environments.
